T001.did: Confirmed a clean baseline — compile passes and the migration + telemetry suites are green before any change.

T002.did: Added the speckit.companion.workflowBeta boolean setting (default off, order 5) under Beta Features with a description covering the Create-Spec picker and Continue/Resume button.

T003.did: Removed the speckit.companion.resumeBeta entry from contributes.configuration so exactly one Companion-workflow setting remains.

T004.did: Repointed ConfigKeys.resumeBeta's value to speckit.companion.workflowBeta, keeping the constant name unchanged.

T005.did: Gated COMPANION_WORKFLOW into the selection list behind a new isCompanionSelectable() check (beta on AND companion installed); the resolution path still always includes it.

T006.did: Activation now sets the resume context key from companion.workflowBeta via coerceLegacyBoolean.

T007.did: The config-change handler reads companion.workflowBeta (affectsConfiguration already targets it via ConfigKeys.resumeBeta) while keeping the context-key name unchanged.

T008.did: Renamed the telemetry BetaSnapshot.resumeBeta field to workflowBeta and sourced it from companion.workflowBeta.

T009.did: Updated the telemetry snapshot test to assert the new workflowBeta field and its companion.workflowBeta source.

T010.did: Verified the isCompanionSelectable() gate returns false when beta is on but the companion piece is absent, so getWorkflows() yields a single-entry list and the picker collapses — no extra guard needed.

T011.did: Confirmed the install-prompt surface reads only companion.installPrompt and on-disk install state, never the workflow beta gate, so the install offer stays reachable when beta is on and companion is missing.

T012.did: Added a migrateResumeBetaToWorkflowBeta test suite covering on-style/off/garbage values, scope preservation, idempotent re-run, no-overwrite of an explicit workflowBeta, and crash-safety.

T013.did: Implemented migrateResumeBetaToWorkflowBeta(): per-scope it copies an on-style resumeBeta into workflowBeta (unless already set) and deletes the old key, reusing coerceLegacyBoolean and the per-scope inspect pattern.

T014.did: Called the new migration during activate() next to the other migrations, wrapped in try/catch so any stored value logs-and-continues without failing activation.

T015.did: Documented the single workflowBeta setting in the README (Beta Features table, Workflow Choice picker gating, and a renamed Companion-workflow-beta subsection) and noted the resumeBeta removal + auto-migration.

T016.did: Updated docs/sidebar.md so the resume action reads its enablement from speckit.companion.workflowBeta and notes the same switch adds the picker.

T017.did: Updated docs/template-profiles.md (picker now gated on beta+installed) and docs/how-it-works.md (added the workflowBeta key) for the single-gate model.
concerns: docs/capture-and-timing.md was left unchanged — it only describes the workflow-engine run/resume capture path, with no resumeBeta toggle or always-on-picker claim to update.

T018.did: Added a user-facing CHANGELOG entry: one setting now turns on the picker + resume, the old resume toggle is gone, and a prior opt-in carries over automatically.

T019.did: Ran the full suite — tsc compiles clean and all 1010 tests pass (84 suites), including the migration + telemetry coverage.
concerns: Quickstart Scenarios A/B/C require the Extension Development Host (F5) and are the documented config/disk coverage gap — they were not run headlessly and remain a manual verification step for the user.
